creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
itetcu      2007-08-15 12:32:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/uriparser        Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Update to 0.5.1. The library has been run through a code analyser, which has
  revealed several flaws in Uriparser. This release fixes those issues.
  
  PR:             ports/115538
  Submitted by:   Ed Schouten (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +2 -3      ports/net/uriparser/Makefile
  1.5       +3 -3      ports/net/uriparser/distinfo
  1.3       +0 -2      ports/net/uriparser/pkg-plist
